description_long: This is a modern hammer with a rectangular, blocky head finished in a light blue color, featuring a dark circular area on the top surface that may serve as a striking or branding plate. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and also blue, with a slightly darker grip section and a wrist strap attached at the end for safety and convenience. The hammer's head is solid and robust, lacking any visible claws or peens, suggesting it is a sledge or mallet type rather than a claw or ball-peen hammer. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with smooth surfaces and no visible fasteners or joints between the head and handle. The wrist strap is thin and brown, likely made of leather or synthetic material, and is looped through a hole at the base of the handle. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments apart from the strap.
description: A sleek, blue sledge-type hammer with a rectangular head, straight handle, and a brown wrist strap. The design is modern and smooth, with a dark circular detail on the head.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow face of the rectangular head, the straight handle, and the wrist strap hanging down.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full width of the rectangular head and the alignment of the handle beneath it.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite narrow face of the head and the handle with the strap visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the head's width and the handle, with the wrist strap more extended and visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical plastic handle with a slightly darker grip section and an attached brown wrist strap; smooth and non-textured.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces and a dark circular detail on the top; no claws or peens present.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Brown wrist strap attached to the handle
